name: Local Dominator
highlight_text: Category: Local Rank Tracking & Competitor Analysis
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Local Dominator Does

Local Dominator is a Google Maps rank checker designed for businesses, agencies, and SEO professionals who need precise local tracking. It lets you check Google Maps rank with interactive grid scans, track competitors, and automate scheduled scans. While great for visual ranking data, it lacks deeper SEO tools like backlink analysis.

Source: Local Dominator 

Key Features

  • Scans thousands of keywords across custom grids to pinpoint where your business ranks on Google Maps.
  • Runs side-by-side competitor ranking reports to see who’s outranking you and where.
  • Share live, interactive rank maps with clients or team members using dynamic URLs

Benefits of Local Dominator

  • Helps businesses improve maps rank checker visibility
  • Tracks competitor rankings in any location
  • Automates local SEO tracking for better insights

Pricing

  • Advance: $59/month (15 Google Maps connections, 15,000 credits)
  • Pro: $97/month (25 Google Maps connections, 36,000 credits)
  • Powerhouse: $197/month (80 Google Maps connections, 81,000 credits)

Pros

  • Strong competitor tracking tools
  • White-label reporting for agencies
  • Custom scan scheduling

Cons

  • Credit-based system may limit heavy users
  • Lacks broader SEO and backlink analysis

‍
